title: poa subverticillata
intro: Poa subverticillata, also known as Poverty Grass, is a type of grass native to the mountainous regions of North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Poa subverticillata include its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its ability to support respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Poa subverticillata can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and other respiratory issues.
